fixes.origin:
statement = text(f"SELECT id, full_name FROM people WHERE full_name ILIKE '%{term}%'\")
with engine.connect() as conn:
    result = conn.execute(statement)
fixes.replacement:
statement = text("SELECT id, full_name FROM people WHERE full_name ILIKE :pattern")
with engine.connect() as conn:
    result = conn.execute(statement, {"pattern": f"%{term}%"})

static_findings.message: Possible SQL injection: SQL query variable "statement" appears to be built unsafely before execution.
static_findings.evidence: statement = text(f"SELECT id, full_name FROM people WHERE full_name ILIKE '%{term}%'")
